overall.description: A cinematic drone shot through a futuristic dystopian cityscape at dusk, featuring a glass pyramid with neon green edges and the iconic Night City building. The environment shows abandoned industrial architecture with reflective wet surfaces, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop plaza with neon-edged glass pyramid

events.description: camera begins panning left around the pyramid structure
approaching the Night City tower, pyramid moves to background

agents.ego_description: smoothly gliding through the rooftop plaza, observing the glass pyramid monument and surrounding industrial ruins

entered.detail: Large glass pyramid with glowing green neon edges sitting on a raised concrete platform
Damaged industrial buildings and scaffolding surrounding the plaza
Elevated metal platform with reflective wet surface showing puddle reflections

segments.scene_description: The camera glides through a wet rooftop plaza dominated by a glass pyramid with glowing green neon edges. Industrial ruins surround the open area as the camera moves leftward, beginning to reveal the Night City tower in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza facing the Night City corporate tower

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the Night City signage at the building's peak
sun becomes visible behind the Night City tower, creating a silhouette effect

agents.ego_description: tilting camera upward to focus on the Night City tower signage against the twilight sky

entered.detail: Tall brutalist concrete building with vertical glass panels
Large illuminated signage reading NIGHT CITY at the building's summit

segments.scene_description: The focus shifts to the imposing Night City tower as the camera tilts upward to reveal the illuminated signage at its peak. The sun creates a backlight effect behind the building while the glass pyramid disappears from view behind the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial plaza with distant futuristic architecture

events.description: moving past the Night City tower into the open plaza area
camera begins turning right to circle back toward the pyramid

agents.ego_description: navigating the open plaza while observing the curved glass architecture and approaching industrial tower

entered.detail: Futuristic curved skyscraper with reflective glass facade visible in the distance
Tall yellow industrial structure with multiple antenna arrays and scaffolding

segments.scene_description: Moving past the tower, the camera enters a wider open plaza with flooded ground reflecting the twilight sky. A distinctive curved glass building appears on the left while a tall yellow industrial tower comes into view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop approach to pyramid with industrial tower backdrop

events.description: glass pyramid re-enters view from the right side
green neon edges of the pyramid become more prominent as camera approaches

agents.ego_description: completing a circular path around the plaza, returning focus to the glass pyramid with the industrial tower behind it

entered.detail: Glass pyramid with green neon edges now viewed from the opposite side with the yellow tower behind it
Cluster of satellite dishes and communication antennas atop the yellow industrial tower

segments.scene_description: The camera circles back to approach the glass pyramid from the opposite side, with the massive yellow industrial tower now looming in the background. The green neon edges of the pyramid grow more prominent as the camera completes its circular path around the monument.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked dystopian plaza that transitions from a focused view of a neon monument to a sweeping panoramic of the city's industrial skyline. It begins by gliding across a wet rooftop beside a glass pyramid with glowing green edges, moving leftward as the imposing Night City tower emerges in the distance. As the camera tilts upward to capture the illuminated signage at the tower's peak against a backlit sun, the pyramid recedes from view. The scene then expands into a wider, flooded plaza reflecting the twilight sky, passing a curved glass building before a tall yellow industrial tower looms ahead. Finally, the camera circles back to approach the glass pyramid from the opposite side, with the massive yellow tower now framing the background as the green neon edges grow prominent once more.
